memoryArtifacts.description: Located on Dayton Road, near Faversham in Badlesmere, Kent, England - Cemetery notes and/or description from findagrave.com: There was a church at Badlesmere in Kent when the Domesday Book was written in 1085. The church came to prominence during the reign of Edward II when Bartholomew of Badlesmere was a court favorite. Its interior is 13th century and 18th century. It has a complete set of Georgian box pews.

zh.Hambleton, Rutland, England: 英國盧特藍德哈布萊頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere於1275年出生在英國肯特巴德萊斯莫時，他的父親Sir Guncelin Badlesmere11272歲，母親Joan FitzBernard42歲。他於大約1304年與Margaret de Clare在英國英格蘭肯特巴德萊斯莫結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1317年住在英國肯特利德斯。他於1298年登記服兵役。他於1318年被列為steward of the king's household。他去世於1322年4月14日在英國肯特坎特布瑞享年47歲，埋葬在英國肯特巴德萊斯莫。

zh-hans.Hambleton, Rutland, England: 英国盧特藍德哈布萊頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere于1275年出生在英国肯特巴德萊斯莫时，他的父亲Sir Guncelin Badlesmere11272岁，母亲Joan FitzBernard42岁。他于大约1304年与Margaret de Clare在英国英格兰肯特巴德萊斯莫结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1317年住在英国肯特利德斯。他于1298年登记服兵役。他于1318年被列为steward of the king's household。他去世于1322年4月14日在英国肯特坎特布瑞享年47岁，埋葬在英国肯特巴德萊斯莫。

nameMeanings.name: Bartholomew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of New Testament origin, the name of an apostle mentioned in all the synoptic gospels (Matthew, Mark, and Luke) and in the Acts of the Apostles. It is an Aramaic formation meaning ‘son of Talmai’, and has been assumed by many scholars to be a byname of the apostle Nathaniel . Talmai is a Hebrew name, said to mean ‘abounding in furrows’ (Numbers 13:22).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere was born in 1275, in Badlesmere, Kent, England, his father, Sir Guncelin Badlesmere, was 11272 and his mother, Joan FitzBernard, was 42. He married Margaret de Clare about 1304, in Badlesmere, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He lived in Leeds, Kent, England in 1317. He registered for military service in 1298. In 1318, his occupation is listed as steward of the king's household. He died on 14 April 1322, in Canterbury, Kent, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in Badlesmere, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere est né en 1275, à Badlesmere, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir Guncelin Badlesmere, avait 11272 ans et sa mère, Joan FitzBernard, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Clare environ 1304, à Badlesmere, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il a vécu à Leeds, Kent, Angleterre en 1317. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1298. En 1318, sa profession de son indiquée est steward of the king's household. Il est décédé le 14 avril 1322, à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Badlesmere, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere 1275 in Badlesmere, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Guncelin Badlesmere 11272 und seine Mutter Joan FitzBernard 42. Er hat um 1304 in Badlesmere, Kent, England, United Kingdom Margaret de Clare geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. 1317 hat er in Leeds, Kent, England gelebt. Er hat sich 1298 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1318 ist sein Beruf als steward of the king's household aufgeführt. Er starb am 14. April 1322 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Canterbury, Kent, England und wurde in Badlesmere, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere è nato il nel 1275 nel Badlesmere, Kent, England, il suo padre, Sir Guncelin Badlesmere, aveva 11272 anni e il suo madre, Joan FitzBernard, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Clare circa 1304, nel Badlesmere, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Vissuto a Leeds, Kent, England nel 1317. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1298. Nel 1318, la sua occupazione è indicata come steward of the king's household. Morì il 14 aprile 1322, nel Canterbury, Kent, England, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Badlesmere, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Bartholomew Badlesmereが1275年にイギリスケントバドレスメアで生まれた時，父Sir Guncelin Badlesmereは11272歳，母Joan FitzBernardは42歳であった。約1304年にイギリスイギリスケントバドレスメアでMargaret de Clareと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1317年にはイギリスケントリーズに住んでいた。彼は1298年に兵役登録をした。1318年，職業はsteward of the king's householdと記録されている。彼は1322年4月14日にイギリスケントカンテルブリーで47歳で死去し，イギリスケントバドレスメアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere(이)가 1275년 영국 켄트 바들레스머에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Guncelin Badlesmere(은)는 11272세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan FitzBernard(은)는 42세였다. 그는 대략 1304년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 바들레스머에서 Margaret de Clare(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1317년도에 영국 켄트 리드즈에서 살았다. 그는 1298년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1318년, 그의 직업은 steward of the king's household이었다. 그는 1322년 4월 14일 영국 켄트 캉르버이에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 바들레스머에 묻혔다.

pt.from 1 November 1317 to 14 April 1322: de 1 de novembro de 1317 a 14 de abril de 1322
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere nasceu em 1275, em Badlesmere, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Guncelin Badlesmere, tinha 11272 anos e sua mãe, Joan FitzBernard, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Clare aproximadamente 1304, em Badlesmere, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele viveu em Leeds, Kent, Inglaterra em 1317. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1298. Em 1318, sua profissão aparece como steward of the king's household. Ele faleceu em 14 de abril de 1322, em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Badlesmere, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere родился в 1275 г. в местности бадлесмир, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Guncelin Badlesmere было 11272 года, а матери, которую звали Joan FitzBernard, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Clare около 1304 г. в местности бадлесмир, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он жил в местности лидс, кэнт, Англия в 1317 году. В 1298 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1318 годуработал по профессии steward of the king's household. Он умер 14 апреля 1322 г. в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности бадлесмир, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere nació en 1275, en Badlesmere, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Guncelin Badlesmere, tenía 11272 años y su mamá, Joan FitzBernard, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Margaret de Clare aproximadamente 1304, en Badlesmere, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Vivió en Leeds, Kent, Inglaterra en 1317. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1298. En 1318, su ocupación registrada era steward of the king's household. Murió el 14 de abril de 1322, en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Badlesmere, Kent, Inglaterra.
